Recurse() {
 Recurse();
 Recurse();
}


For the CSS-savvy: inspect element and try to animate the branch and flower elements of the tree!

When you're done, press CTRL+P and print!
(make sure to enable to enable 'print backgrounds' in the printing settings)

Fractal Variables






The ratio is the number by which the following branch's length is multiplied.



Flowers are divs that have a chance to sprout along a branch









Style Variables

Branches




Corner Rounding (Pixels):




Need help? you can also build a background here and copy it over!










Border types: none, hidden, dotted, dashed, solid,
double, groove, ridge, inset, outset





Box Shadow:





Flowers





Corner Rounding (Pixels):



Need help? you can also build a background here and copy it over!










Border types: none, hidden, dotted, dashed, solid,
double, groove, ridge, inset, outset





Box Shadow:
